mapper.sql: prescription_id, patient_id, patient_name, medical_record_id, doctor_id, doctor_name, prescription_date, diagnosis, chief_complaint, medical_history, allergy_history, category, status, total_amount, medicines, usage, remark, signature, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM clinic_prescription WHERE prescription_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM clinic_prescription WHERE patient_id = #{patientId}
